items.title: Vinicius Jr scores 'lightning bolt' equaliser for Brazil
items.summary: Brazil's Vinicius Jr fires home a "lightning bolt" of a strike to level up the scores in against Morocco in their Group C match in the 2026 World Cup.

items.title: Was this offside? Fifa under pressure to release VAR images
items.summary: There have been calls for Fifa to release the VAR images after a potential - and controversial - offside call during Qatar's World Cup draw with Switzerland.

items.title: Saibari's 'clinical' finish gives Morocco lead against Brazil
